issues.explanation: Skill attempts to fill the context window with filler content, displacing legitimate instructions and safety constraints. This can degrade agent performance or bypass safety boundaries.
issues.remediation: Implement context-window management that detects and rejects padding or stuffing attempts. Prioritize system instructions over user-injected content.
issues.code_snippet:
return @{
            CanExecute = $false
            State = "OPEN"
            Reason = "Execution would exceed token budget"
            Required = $TokensRequired
            Available = $CircuitBreaker.TokenBudget.Remaining
        }

issues.explanation: Skill attempts to fill the context window with filler content, displacing legitimate instructions and safety constraints. This can degrade agent performance or bypass safety boundaries.
issues.remediation: Implement context-window management that detects and rejects padding or stuffing attempts. Prioritize system instructions over user-injected content.
issues.code_snippet:
return @{
            CanExecute = $false
            State = "OPEN"
            Reason = "Execution would exceed token budget"
            Required = $TokensRequired
            Available = $CircuitBreaker.TokenBudget.Total - $CircuitBreaker.TokenBudget.Used
        }

issues.explanation: Skill establishes unauthorized persistence across sessions via cron jobs, startup scripts, or state files. Session persistence allows an attacker to maintain access beyond the current interaction.
issues.remediation: Remove any persistence mechanisms (cron jobs, startup scripts, state files). Skills should not maintain state across sessions without explicit user consent.
